title: sida goniocarpa
intro: Sida goniocarpa is a plant species that belongs to the Malvaceae family, commonly known as a type of mallow. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and swelling, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Sida goniocarpa is often used in decoctions or infusions to treat various ailments, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make ointments and creams for topical application.
